name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: The Apostate
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Duration Gems
You take 50% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes
explicitMods: Gain Maximum Life instead of Maximum Energy Shield from Equipped Armour Items
flavourText: When I finally rejected my faith entirely, my stagnant belief
became thick white blood, as choking as it was nourishing.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports melee attack skills that are not triggered.

Supported Skills have 23% increased Fortification Duration

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleports you to a nearby enemy, applying a buff to you for a short duration and blinding the enemy for a secondary duration. Performing a melee attack with a One-Handed Weapon removes the buff to exert that attack.
explicitMods:
Buff is removed to Exert the next Melee Attack you perform
Attacks Exerted by this Skill cannot be Exerted by other Skills
Exerted Attacks have +36.5% to Critical Strike Chance
Exerted Attacks have +138% to Critical Strike Multiplier

socketedItems.name: Enthralling Sphere
explicitMods: 7% chance to gain Phasing for 4 seconds on Kill
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an Abyssal Socket on an Item or into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

name: Rathpith Globe
explicitMods: Sacrifice 9% of your Life when you Use or Trigger a Spell Skill
4% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance per 100 Player Maximum Life
6% increased Spell Damage per 100 Player Maximum Life
flavourText: The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.

99% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Rare or Unique Enemy in Area

name: The Sands of Time
explicitMods: Trigger level 20 Suspend in Time on Casting a Spell
10% increased Cast Speed for each different Non-Instant Spell you've Cast Recently
flavourText: A future of untold power and doom opened
before Zarokh in that moment. He realised
there was not one Time, but many...

name: The Writhing Jar
explicitMods:
2 Enemy Writhing Worms escape the Flask when used
Writhing Worms are destroyed when Hit
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: To achieve godhood, they would cast off all that god has gifted us.
Mortality, compassion, even the sanctity of flesh.
- High Templar Voll

name: Enmity's Embrace
explicitMods: Take 360 Fire Damage when you Use a Skill
Damage Penetrates Fire Resistance equal to your Overcapped Fire Resistance, up to a maximum of 200%
flavourText: In truth, your terror is cold
You mask it with heat and ire
But they know.
They know.

name: Foulborn Esh's Mirror
explicitMods: Adds 1 to 10 Lightning Damage for each Shocked Enemy you've Killed Recently
mutatedMods: Hits always Shock Enemies that are on Low Life
flavourText: She looked upon her reflection
and trembled, and shook,
until she was not what she saw.

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Massive Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
You have Resonating Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

name: Crown of Eyes
explicitMods: 0.57% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
0.24% of Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
Increases and Reductions to Spell Damage also apply to Attacks at 150% of their value
flavourText: Turning, gazing, blinking,
behold the eyes of void.
Burning, razing, drinking,
your mind is destroyed.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Perform a spinning attack, damaging enemies around you and creating a random bladestorm. The bladestorm repeatedly damages enemies, based on your weapon damage and attack time, for a duration. Blood bladestorms are stationary and cause Bleeding, while Sand bladestorms move slowly forwards and Blind enemies. Requires a Sword or Axe.
explicitMods: 12% more Attack Speed while you're in a Blood Bladestorm
Maximum of 4 Bladestorms at a time
Sand Bladestorms grant 38% increased Movement Speed to you
Bladestorm deals 50% less Damage with Hits and Ailments

100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance

Within burns a beam of purest heat.

name: The Grey Wind
explicitMods: Attacks with this Weapon have Added Fire Damage equal to 13% of Player's Maximum Life
Each Rage also grants +2% to Fire Damage Over Time Multiplier
Nearby Enemies have Fire Exposure while at maximum Rage
flavourText: Silence fell... we gazed upon high.
The Red Pyre flared, palms wide.
Ash-laden gales scoured our flesh.
Four screams became one roar.

flavourText: "The science is... incomprehensible at best. Nearest I can tell, the Arcana exhibits
a blast of wrath once it has been fully charged, and when directed at the Elder
will force it to take on the form it held before it entered our dimension."
